summary: Excellent audience recording featuring a blissful, 72‑minute Dark Star>Dew jam
review: The reviewer raves about the audio quality, calling the tape an "improved gem" and urging listeners to crank it up. The performance is highlighted by a soaring 72‑minute Dark Star into Dew sequence that lives up to its name.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; both show and recording are praised, leading to a high composite rating but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer explicitly loves the AUD (audio) quality, describing it as an "improved gem" with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A massive 72‑minute fall creates a powerful, uplifting jam that dominates the show’s momentum.
